name: Slow-Cooked Pepper Steak
recipeIngredient: 14 1/2 oz can Hunt's Choice-Cut Diced Tomatoes with Italian Style Herbs
2 large green peppers, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into strips; brown in oil in a skillet. Transfer to a slow cooker.
2. Combine the remaining ingredients (soy sauce, onion, garlic, sugar, salt, pepper, ground ginger, tomatoes with liquid, Hunt's Choice-Cut Diced Tomatoes with Italian Style Herbs, green peppers) and pour over beef. Cover and cook on low for 5-6 hours or until meat is tender.
3. Add the green peppers; cook on low for an additional 1 hour.
4. Combine the cold water and cornstarch to make a paste. Stir into the liquid in the slow cooker and cook on high until thickened.
5. Serve over noodles.
